posts.author: Matt_B (Matt Barker)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m hoping someone can point me in the right direction…
I trying to set up a stock and order management system. I have a sellable product which contains multiple parts (and various quantities of each) - all of which I need to monitor independently in terms of stock level, supplier etc. When an order is placed for the said product I need it to automatically take all of the components from stock. Is there a way to do this? All the examples I’ve come across seem to be for single item orders not a ‘build of materials’ situation?
TIA
